name: Empresa Electrica Pehuenche S.A.
summary: Empresa El√É¬©ctrica Pehuenche S.A. engages in the generation, transportation, distribution, and provision of electric power; and the construction of hydroelectric plants in Chile. It operates in two segments, Sale of Energy and Other Services. The company owns and operates Pehuenche, Curillinque, and Loma Alta hydroelectric plants. It serves residential customers, commercial customers, and small and medium industries. The company was founded in 1986 and is headquartered in Santiago, Chile. Empresa El√É¬©ctrica Pehuenche S.A. is a subsidiary of Empresa Nacional de Electricidad S.A.
